message.content:
@startuml
title PCWS Sequences

actor Customer as C1
participant PCWS as PCWS
participant PostgreSQL as PG
participant Disk as Disk
participant transfer_logs.sh as TransferLogs
participant AccountService as AccountService
participant DatalogService as DatalogService

C1 ..> PCWS : request image
PCWS ..> AccountService : check account permission
AccountService ..> PG : write data log
PCWS ..> Disk : write data log
PCWS ..> C1 : image

C1 ..> TransferLogs : read data log
TransferLogs ..> DatalogService : send data log
DatalogService ..> TransferLogs : read data log

TransferLogs ..> Disk : some time later

loop [for each log]
    TransferLogs ..> Disk : read data log
    TransferLogs ..> DatalogService : send data log
end loop

@enduml
